zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Hastings於1221年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿希爾時，她的父親William de Hastings56歲，母親Margaret le Bigod39歲。她於1239年與Gilbert de Pecche在英國諾福爾可阿希爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1265年在英國林可爾史爾包恩享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦素瓦可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Hastings于1221年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可阿希爾时，她的父亲William de Hastings56岁，母亲Margaret le Bigod39岁。她于1239年与Gilbert de Pecche在英国諾福爾可阿希爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1265年在英国林可爾史爾包恩享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦素瓦可。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Hastings was born in 1221, in Ashill, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Hastings, was 56 and her mother, Margaret le Bigod, was 39. She married Gilbert de Pecche in 1239, in Ashill, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1265, in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Southwark, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Hastings est née en 1221, à Ashill, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Hastings, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Margaret le Bigod, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Pecche en 1239, à Ashill, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1265, à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Southwark, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Hastingsが1221年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクアシュイルで生まれた時，父William de Hastingsは56歳，母Margaret le Bigodは39歳であった。1239年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュイルでGilbert de Peccheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1265年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンソウスワークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Hastings(이)가 1221년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 애시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Hastings(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret le Bigod(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1239년 영국 노르폴크 애시에서 Gilbert de Pecche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 영국 링코실르 본에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 소우스워크에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Gilbert de Pecche em 1239, em Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Hastings родилась в 1221 г. в местности ашилл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Hastings было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret le Bigod, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Pecche в 1239 г. в местности ашилл, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1265 г. в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности соутварк, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
